title: HOA Manager
description:
The HOA Property Manager is responsible for the day?to?day operations, governance support, vendor oversight, and owner/resident experience across an assigned portfolio of homeowner associations. This role requires strong analytical ability, impeccable attention to detail, and exceptional written and verbal communication skills. The manager serves as the primary liaison among the Board of Directors, unit owners, residents, vendors, and internal teams (Maintenance and Finance), ensuring that association operations comply with governing documents, applicable laws, and company standards while meeting service-level and financial targets.



Key Outcomes (What Success Looks Like):



Accurate, timely Board packets and meeting facilitation with clear minutes and action logs

Portfolio-level adherence to budgets, assessments, and reserve funding plans in partnership with Finance HOA

Proactive maintenance planning and on-time completion of preventive and corrective work with Maintenance HOA

High owner/resident satisfaction, timely resolution of requests, and transparent communications

Clean annual audits, renewed insurance policies, and documented compliance with statutes and governing documents

Up-to-date task/project management in Asana and on-time delivery of recurring HOA cycles and filings



Key Responsibilities:

1) Board & Governance Management

Serve as the primary point of contact for Board members; prepare agendas, Board packets, and management reports for regular and special meetings.

Interpret and apply governing documents (CC&Rs, bylaws, rules) and relevant state statutes in daily operations; coordinate with counsel when required.

Facilitate annual meetings, elections, and owner notices in accordance with legal and governing document requirements.

2) Owner & Resident Relations

Maintain responsive, professional communication with trustees/Board, unit owners, and residents via
, phone, and portal.

Issue timely association-wide notices (policy changes, maintenance schedules, community events, compliance reminders).

Manage and resolve escalations, complaints, architectural review requests (ARC), violations, and hearings within established SLAs.

3) Financial Coordination & Reporting 

Support budget development, reserve study implementation, and monthly variance commentary; review financials for accuracy.

Monitor assessment billing, collections, payment plans, and delinquency follow-up in alignment with collection policies.

Review and approve invoices, code expenses to budgets, and validate vendor work completion prior to payment.

4) Maintenance, Projects & Vendor Management (with Maintenance HOA)

Translate Board priorities into annual maintenance calendars; schedule and track preventive maintenance and inspections.

Open, monitor, and close work orders; ensure scope, SLA, and quality standards are met; maintain accurate asset records.

Bid, negotiate, and manage vendor contracts (landscaping, janitorial, security, pools, roofing, elevators, etc.); perform periodic vendor reviews.

Coordinate capital improvement projects (RFPs, proposals, schedules, owner notifications, punch lists, closeout documents).

5) Information Management & Systems

Keep all HOA Asana projects/boards current with daily updates, dependencies, and follow-ups; maintain recurring tasks and automations.

Process resale and lender questionnaire packages accurately and within service timelines; maintain fee schedules.

Maintain organized digital records (governing docs, minutes, contracts, insurance, warranties, architectural files) in the association’s repository.

6) Team Leadership & Development

Train and onboard new APMs/PMs on processes, systems (Asana, accounting/portal), compliance, and customer service standards.

Promote a collaborative, service-oriented culture aligned with company values; escalate staffing/resource needs to the Unit Head.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):

On-time completion rate for recurring HOA tasks and compliance filings

Work-order first-response and average time-to-close (by priority)

Delinquency rate and collections effectiveness; percent of assessments collected

Budget adherence (OPEX/CapEx) and variance accuracy; invoice cycle time

Owner/resident satisfaction score; complaint resolution time

Board satisfaction score (post-meeting surveys) and action-item closure rate

Qualifications:

3+ years of HOA/condo association management or related property management experience

Demonstrated proficiency with task/project management tools (Asana) and owner portals; strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

Exceptional communication (written and verbal), meeting facilitation, and stakeholder management

Strong analytical, organizational, and time-management skills; high attention to detail

Working knowledge of governing documents, meeting procedures, collections, elections, and common HOA statutes

title: Maintenance Coordinator - Bilingual
description:
PSB (Pro Services Boston) and Green Ocean Property Management are integrated maintenance + property management teams serving the Greater Boston market. We manage multifamily, single-family, and HOA assets and run an in-house service operation focused on speed, quality, and clear communication.



Role Overview:

The Maintenance Coordinator is the command center for all work orders: intake, triage, scheduling, vendor coordination, tenant communications, and close-out. You’ll prioritize urgent issues, keep preventive maintenance on cadence, and drive down cycle times. This is a performance role with clear SLAs, daily accountability rhythms, and growth into senior coordination/ops leadership.



Core Responsibilities:

Work Order Intake & Triage

Receive requests via portal/phone/email; log with complete scope, photos, access info, and priority tag.

Classify by Priority (P0–P3) and building/owner rules; verify warranty/recall/recurring issues.

Pre-diagnose to reduce truck rolls (simple resets, filter sizes, breaker checks, shutoff guidance).

Scheduling & Dispatch

Assign to the right vendor/tech based on trade, SLA, geography, availability, and cost.

Build and update daily/weekly schedules; confirm tenant access, lockbox codes, pet/alarms, parking.

Create and track Not-to-Exceed (NTE) amounts; obtain approvals when required.

Vendor Management

Coordinate licensed vendors (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, appliance, roofing, etc.).

Ensure COI/W-9/licenses are current; validate arrival/completion, photo proof, and written diagnosis.

Request quotes for >NTE jobs; compare scope/price; route to approval.

Tenant & Owner Communication

Provide clear ETAs, prep steps (water shutoff, clearing access), and progress updates.

Set expectations for parts lead times and follow-ups; confirm satisfaction at completion.

Escalate sensitively when work impacts health/safety or habitability.

Preventive Maintenance (PM)

Maintain seasonal PM calendars (boilers/furnaces, gutters, dryer vents, smoke/CO checks, filter changes).

Batch/schedule PMs to minimize tenant disruption and travel time; track completion.

Invoicing & Close-Out

Ensure work orders have diagnosis, materials, labor, before/after photos, and time stamps.

Match invoices to WOs, verify against NTE, route exceptions, and submit to accounting the same day.

Emergencies & After-Hours Coordination

Follow the P0/P1 emergency SOP (gas/water/electrical hazards, no-heat, lockouts).

Coordinate on-call vendors, city services, and temporary mitigation.

Reporting & Quality

Produce daily/weekly reports on SLA adherence, WIP aging, cost variance, and vendor performance.

Flag repeat issues, recommend root-cause fixes (access hardware, part stocking, vendor changes).

Qualifications:

Fluent in English and Spanish language

Maintenance coordinating experience in a US Property Management company is a must

Knowledgeable in construction engineering is a plus

Has excellent problem solving skill

Good communication skills in English

Outstanding skills in organizing schedules

Experience with property management software Buildium/Property Meld is a plus

Self-driven and can work with little supervision

Extremely organized and can work in a constantly changing and fast past environment

Want to have a stable career with endless potential for learning and growth

Able to work on EST Business hours



IF YOU ARE NOT A BILINGUAL MAINTENANCE COORDINATOR- Please do not Apply or you will not be entertained. Thank you

title: IG Reels Video Editor
description:
We’re on the hunt for a Reels editor who gets it — someone who doesn’t just slap clips together, but knows how to create energy, emotion, and engagement. If you live on Instagram, can predict trends before they peak, and know what feels right for a brand, we want you.



About Us



Talent Tribe Media, powered by Nexus Hawaii, is a full-force creative team that works with Hawaii’s top influencers, brands, and business leaders. We craft digital content that captures the island vibe with world-class quality — authentic, aesthetic, and built for engagement.



We’re expanding, and we want a video editor who can keep up with both Hawaii’s chill energy and fast-paced social media trends.



Your Role



-Edit Instagram Reels (and occasionally TikToks) that align with each brand’s voice and audience.

-Translate raw clips into scroll-stopping content that drives engagement and conversions.

-Stay up to date with current audio, transitions, trends, and hooks — and bring fresh ideas to the table.

-Collaborate with our creative team in Hawaii time — be responsive, communicative, and ready to move when inspiration strikes.

-Maintain consistency in branding, pacing, and storytelling across all deliverables.



The role is project-based, typically around 2–3 hours of paid output per project, with a 24-hour turnaround for final edits. It’s not a fixed schedule or salaried position, but more on an as-needed basis depending on project availability.



You’re Perfect For This If You:



-Have proven experience editing Reels or short-form videos (send your portfolio — we actually check it).

-Are fluent in Instagram culture: trends, algorithms, aesthetics, and audience psychology.

-Have a solid sense of timing, rhythm, and emotional pull.

-Know how to adapt your editing style to different brands or industries.

-Have good work ethics — meaning you meet deadlines, communicate clearly, and take feedback professionally.

-Can work independently but thrive in a team that moves fast.

-willing to work on a project based set up. the faster you finish a project the more projects to be given and higher chance of earning more. 



Nice to Have



-Experience with CapCut, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut Pro.

-Understanding of marketing or storytelling in lifestyle, beauty, or creative industries.

-Familiarity with the Hawaii market or island culture.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us



-Hawaii-based creative energy (we like chill, but we mean business).

-Flexible working schedule with long-term potential.

-Collaborative team that values passion and initiative.



To apply:

Send your CV & portfolio (Reels or video samples), your favorite Reel you’ve ever made, and a quick note on how you stay ahead of trends.

title: PERSONAL ASSISTANT TO CEO
description:
20-40HRS/WK 

PERSONAL ASSISTANT TO CEO

Australian business · Sydney timezone · Remote · Immediate start



Pay rate: Up to $4.00 USD per hour

Hours: 20 to 40 hours per week

Timezone: Sydney AEST

Start date: Within 2 weeks





ABOUT US



My Australian businesses have been operating for about 20 years, and I'm looking for someone to become my PA and go-to person. You will work directly with me across day-to-day operations, accounts, admin, and digital tasks and help manage future VA's.





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Core skills (required)



- Clear, confident written and spoken English

- Google Workspace — Sheets, Docs, Gmail, Drive, Calendar

- Xero — invoicing, basic reconciliation, and reporting

- Calendar and diary management across timezones

- File and document organisation

- Following up on tasks and reporting back without being prompted

- Data entry with strong attention to detail

- Create, edit, and combine PDFs

- Online research — suppliers, competitors, fact-finding



Desirable skills (not required)



- WordPress site updates via browser

- Basic SEO content and on-page optimisation

- Social media scheduling and posting

- AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) for drafting and research

- Basic graphic design (Canva or similar)

- CRM or project management tools (Trello, Notion, etc.)





ARE YOU "WILLINGABLE"?



Are you willing and able — "willingable" — to find solutions, take action, keep learning, be flexible, and look for ways to help? Can you focus on outcomes and solutions? Do you have an eye for detail?



If that's you, we want to hear from you.





TOOLS YOU'LL USE



- AnyDesk — screen sharing and collaboration during calls

- Google Meet — video calls (webcam + audio required)

- onlinejobs.ph TimeProof or agreed alternative for time tracking

- Google Workspace — Sheets, Docs, Gmail, Drive

- WordPress (browser-based access)

- Xero for accounts

- PDF tools for editing and creating PDFs

- WhatsApp for communication and calls





EQUIPMENT REQUIRED



- Good PC — please specify model, RAM, and HDD/SSD space

- Fast and stable internet — screenshot from speedtest.net required

- Webcam with working video and audio

- Google account

- WhatsApp installed





HOW TO APPLY



Please complete the questionnaire in full. Incomplete applications will not be considered.



Your application subject line must include the keyword shown in quotation marks above as the first work in your subject line. Applications without the correct subject line will not be reviewed.



We receive a high volume of applications. Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted. A small note for careful readers: append the number 1 directly after your keyword with no space, so we know you read everything.





SELECTION PROCESS



1. Correct attention to detail with all questions answered

2. Applicants sorted by pay rate first, then skills compared

3. Best 5 (best pay rate to skills ratio) shortlisted for interview





---





QUESTIONNAIRE — Please complete all questions and submit with your application. Your subject line must include the keyword from the job post.





ABOUT YOU



Q1. What is your full name and the city/province you are based in?



Q2. What is your desired hourly rate in USD? (Applications are sorted by rate first, then skills.)



Q3. How many hours per week are you available? Are you able to work within Sydney AEST business hours?



Q4. Can you start within 2 weeks? If not, when can you start?





CORE SKILLS



Q5. Rate your Google Sheets skill from 1–10. Describe one task you have completed in Sheets — formulas, reports, data management, etc.



Q6. Do you have experience with Xero? If yes, describe the tasks you have used it for — invoicing, reconciliation, reporting, etc.



Q7. Rate your written and spoken English from 1–10. Have you previously worked in a role where English was the primary language of communication?



Q8. Describe how you manage your workload when you have multiple deadlines or requests arriving at the same time.



Q9. Give an example of a time you organised files, documents, or records for someone else. How did you structure it?





DESIRABLE SKILLS



Q10. Do you have experience with any of the following: WordPress, SEO, social media management, AI tools, Canva? For each you have used, rate yourself from 1–10 and give a brief example.





EQUIPMENT AND SETUP



Q11. What PC do you use? Please state the model (or specs), amount of RAM, and available HDD/SSD storage space.



Q12. Please attach a screenshot of your internet speed from speedtest.net showing download speed, upload speed, and ping.



Q13. Do you have a webcam with working video and audio? Do you have WhatsApp installed?



Q14. Do you have a Google account available for work use? Are you experienced using AnyDesk and google meet for screen sharing during calls?





FIT AND WORK STYLE



Q15. In your own words, what does being "willingable" mean to you? Give a real example from past work where you took initiative or found a solution without being asked.



Q16. Describe a mistake you made at work. What did you do to fix it and what did you learn from it?



Q17. What do you find most satisfying about PA or admin work? Is there any type of task you find difficult or prefer to avoid?

Compensation

• Long-term, stable full-time role with growth opportunities

title: GHL Virtual Assistant and Appointment Setter for Revenue Recovery Company
description:
Job Type: Part-Time | Long-Term | Remote



Pay: $3 to $4 per hour base + $25 commission per audit that shows up + $50 commission per client you source yourself that closes



About the Company



Odyssey Apex is a revenue recovery company based in Florida. We help home service contractors (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing) recover $5K to $15K per month in missed call revenue using a done-for-you system built inside GoHighLevel. We are growing and need a reliable VA to handle client account management and cold call local contractors to set audit appointments for the owner.



What You Will Do



You will have two responsibilities.



First, account management inside GHL. This includes updating 5 numeric fields on client contact records weekly (calls captured, leads qualified, jobs booked, average ticket, revenue recovered), tagging new clients with the active-client tag at onboarding, confirming Monday ROI report
s sent correctly, and running a basic QA checklist per client to confirm the system is working. Flag anything broken to Adam directly via WhatsApp.



Second, appointment setting. We provide you with call lists of home service business owners in Florida. Your job is one thing: book a free 20-minute audit call with Adam. You do not sell anything. You ask one question, handle basic objections using the script we give you, and set the appointment in GHL. Every audit appointment that shows up earns you $25 on top of your hourly pay.



If you find your own companies outside of the lists we provide and that business becomes a paying client, you earn a $50 commission on top of everything else. There is no cap on commissions.



What We Need From You



You must have experience inside GoHighLevel or be willing to learn it fast using our SOPs. You must have clear confident spoken English. You must be available during US Eastern Time business hours (9AM to 5PM EST). You must have a stable internet connection and WhatsApp for daily communication. You must be comfortable making outbound calls and handling brush-offs calmly.



Hours



Starting at 15 to 20 hours per week. Grows as the client base grows. This is a long-term role. A VA booking 3 to 4 closed appointments per week earns an extra $300 to $400 per month on top of base pay. With growth to find and close your own leads on top of that and your earnings grow with no ceiling.



How to Apply



Send a short voice memo or video (2 minutes max) via WhatsApp to 
introducing yourself and telling me about a time you made outbound calls or handled a rejection on the phone. Applications without a voice memo will not be reviewed.

title: Generalist Operator – Digital Marketing & Business Ops
description:
**Generalist Operator – Digital Marketing & Business Ops**

NexMove Holdings · Remote · Full-Time · Long-Term



**About This Role**



NexMove Holdings is a US-based digital holding company building multiple online revenue streams simultaneously — affiliate marketing, e-commerce, digital products, TikTok shops, paid ads, and more. We are in our founding stage and growing fast.



We are hiring our very first team member — a smart, hungry, versatile operator who can wear multiple hats, execute without hand-holding, and grow into a senior role as we scale. This is not just a job. This is a founding team position.



The first person who joins before NexMove is big is the one who benefits most when it becomes huge. We are looking for someone who sees this for what it is — a ground-floor opportunity.



---



**What You Will Own**



- Affiliate marketing — research and promote high-commission offers on ClickBank, Impact, and ShareASale using content and paid traffic

- Paid ads — run and test small-budget campaigns on Meta and TikTok, find winning creatives, report what converts

- Content strategy — identify trending hooks and formats, guide content output across platforms, know what the algorithm rewards right now

- E-commerce support — assist with TikTok Shop launches, product research, UGC briefs, and basic store operations

- Outreach campaigns — execute cold
, SMS/text blast, and cold call outreach for lead generation and partnership prospecting

- Funnel setup — build basic landing pages, set up link tracking, manage
 capture so every piece of content leads somewhere profitable

- Daily intelligence brief — each morning, deliver a short report on trending offers, competitor ads, and new opportunities

- Operations and project management — keep tasks moving, manage tools, make sure nothing falls through the cracks



---



**What We Are Looking For**



- Strong written and spoken English — you will communicate with US clients and audiences

- Experience with affiliate marketing, paid ads, content creation, or outreach (self-taught counts)

- Comfortable with cold outreach —
, SMS blasts, and cold call experience is a big plus

- Fluent with AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude and uses them daily to multiply output

- Self-directed and proactive — you do not wait to be told what to do

- Available to overlap with US Central Time, ideally 5:00 AM–9:00 AM CST for daily sync

- Reliable internet and a quiet working environment

- Hungry to grow — you want a career, not just a paycheck



---



**Growth Path**



Phase 1: Generalist Operator ? Phase 2: Ops/Growth Lead ? Phase 3: Senior Director



As we hire specialists for each function, you step up to lead them. Your career grows as fast as the company you help build.



---



**How to Apply**



To make sure we can follow up with you directly, please include the following at the bottom of your application message here:



1. Your full name

2. Your personal
 address (so we can send you next steps outside this platform)

3. Your WhatsApp number if you have one

4. A short intro — who you are and why this role fits you

5. Any past experience in digital marketing, ads, content, or outreach

6. Your availability and timezone

7. Answer this one question: *Name one trending affiliate offer right now and how you would promote it.*



Applicants who follow these instructions and answer the question move to the top of our list. We will reach out to shortlisted candidates directly within 48 hours.



---



That last section is the key — it naturally prompts them to drop their
 and WhatsApp without you having to post yours. Once you have their contact info you can move the whole conversation off the platform and into your own pipeline. Works cleanly within the free plan limitations.

You will help build and implement “AI employees” that can analyze, optimize, and execute key business functions—saving time, increasing efficiency, and improving results across the organization.

Identify gaps in customer communication and user experience

Develop automated solutions that improve clarity, conversions, and performance

Use AI to generate actionable insights and recommendations

Optimize messaging so customers clearly understand:

What we do

How it benefits them

What action they should take next

Continuously improve systems to increase efficiency and scalability

Collaborate with leadership to implement growth strategies

Key Responsibilities

Create AI models that evaluate and score business assets (websites, funnels, messaging)

Identify top improvement opportunities and implement solutions

Replace manual processes with automated AI workflows

Build systems that deliver clear, data-driven recommendations

Stay up to date with the latest AI tools and trends

What We’re Looking For

title: Apparel Production Coordinator (Aus Fashion Brand)
description:
Merchandise Administration Coordinator

Global headwear brand — Remote (must work 9am–5p
lbourne / AEST Mon–Fri)

 Pay: $245 USD per week (paid weekly)

Contract: Ongoing (we’re looking for someone long-term who can grow into more senior merchandising/admin responsibilities).

Start: ASAP / by mutual agreement.



Love merchandising, data and making product launches run smoothly? We’re looking for a tidy-minded merch admin who lives in PLM, gets inventory reporting, and has real-world experience in fashion/accessories/footwear. This is a hands-on, highly visible role — you’ll sit at the intersection of Product, Sales, Customer Service and Inventory and help keep the engine running.



Why this role is great

- Work with a global headwear brand and play a key role in product launches and program execution.

- Remote, but fully aligned to Melbourne hours (so you’re paid to collaborate with senior merchandisers and cross-functional teams in real time).

- Weekly pay, stable ongoing contract — ideal for merch admins who want reliable hours and a clear scope of work.



What you’ll own

- PLM data creation & maintenance — create and manage product MIDs/attributes, season/collection fields, program and custom MIDs, and ensure data architecture supports commercial reporting and forecasting.

- Order form & program setup — develop accurate order forms for launches, confirm deadlines, and ensure global MIDs are created in advance of programs.

- Inventory & sales reporting — produce weekly SOH, NOS/ATP, residual stock, sell-through and weeks-cover reporting; support wholesale and B2B reporting.

- Global range & program support — manage cancelled MIDs/program communications, post program wrap-ups, assist with global launches and forecasts.

- Cross-team collaboration — liaise with Product, Sourcing, Sales, Customer Service and Master Data teams to keep everyone aligned.

- Continuous improvement — spot data gaps, propose fixes, and improve the PLM/master data setup for smoother reporting and fewer exceptions.



What is a Product MID (short and useful)

A product MID — short for Material ID (also called Master Item ID or Style ID) — is the single, system-level identifier for a product family in your PLM/ERP.



- It’s the master record for a style or concept; individual SKUs/barcodes are created from that master.

- Typical MID fields: season, collection, product name/description, category/family, colour range, size range, composition/materials, BOM/components, cost, vendor/sourcing info, HS code/GTIN, images, and launch + sales end dates.

- Why it matters: the MID is the single source of truth for launches, costing, customs/program tracking, ordering and reporting. Clean MIDs = fewer exceptions, faster launches, and reliable inventory & sell-through reporting.



What we need from you (must-haves):

- PLM experience — essential. You’ve used PLM day-to-day (MID creation, attribute input, order form creation).

- Fashion / accessories / footwear experience — essential. You’ve worked in retail/wholesale merchandising or product admin for apparel, footwear or accessories.

- Strong Excel and data skills. Comfortable with data entry, cleanups, pivot tables and basic reporting.

- Excellent English communication. You’ll be collaborating heavily with Australia-based teams.

- Organised, accurate, and deadline-driven. You manage high volumes of product data without dropping the ball.

- Availability: Must be available 9:00am–5:00p
lbourne time (AEST/AEDT) Mon–Fri.



Nice-to-haves:

- SAP experience highly regarded — not essential, but a big plus.

- Experience with BI/HANA or other reporting tools.

- Knowledge of master data best-practices and product lifecycle.

- Previous work with global program launches and sourcing teams.



What success looks like (first 3 months):

- PLM inputs for new programs and customs are timely and accurate.

- Order forms and program deadlines are consistently correct and shared on time.

- Weekly inventory and sell-through reports delivered on schedule, with clear, actionable commentary.

- Fewer data exceptions and faster program wrap-ups thanks to cleaner master data.



How to apply (please be concise)



1. When you apply, send:

- Short cover note (2–4 sentences): why you’re a fit and confirm you can work 9am–5p
lbourne time.

- CV with recent merch/admin roles highlighted.

- Brief PLM summary (system name, how long you used it, and 3 core PLM tasks you owned).

- Example/report: a short description (or a redacted sample) of an inventory or sell-through report you created.



2. Screening questions (answer these in your application):

- Name the PLM system(s) you’ve used, years of experience, and the top 3 PLM tasks you owned.

- Do you have any SAP experience? If yes, describe briefly.

- Confirm you can work 9am–5p
lbourne time.

- Are you comfortable with the weekly pay of $245 USD/week?

title: URGENT: HIGH PAYING LONG TERM SALES REPS NEEDED! HIRING NOW!
description:
Are you a hungry professional who is GREAT on the phone for a US customer? We’re a people centric Sales Development Rep(SDR) team seeking professionals who like to serve customers and WANT TO GROW IN THEIR SALES SKILLS.

You’ll spend a lot of time making phone calls to customers and prospects to offer helpful healthcare products that help clinics get more patients and be more profitable. If that resonates with you, please keep reading.

Our dynamic CSR team is on the lookout for someone who’s ready to make a positive impact and earn what they deserve.

No experience required.

We only require a GOOD attitude, RESILIENT to make lots of phone calls and STRONG American conversational skills and PATIENT even if it requires some repetitive tasks.

What You’ll Do:

1 - Reach out to prospective customers through the phone.

2 - You’ll be given a script to follow to expedite your outreach process.

3 - You’ll be given all the info you need to help make successful phone calls.

2 - You’ll move into a probation period to prove your skills

3 - You’ll transition to a full-time contract polishing your skills

What We’re Looking For:

A - High American English conversational skills: You want to sound like you live next door to a US customer.

B - Passion for customer satisfaction: You genuinely enjoy helping customers and have a natural knack for delivering exceptional service.

C - Passion for seeing customers buy products from you. (Sales experience not required)

D - Good work ethic: You understand that we cannot teach attitude and discipline. You love to show up on time and contribute to success.

Availability:

1 - Monday through Friday, from 9 AM to 6 PM US Pacific Time Zone.

2 - You’re not just looking for a job – you’re eager to grow with us and make a lot of commission based on your efforts.

3 - You’re hungry to become a professional - you’re kind, but resilient, never giving up to reach clients who need your help.

Why You’ll Love It Here:

1 - You’re honest: We and our customers are humans. You love people and always want to treat them right by telling the truth, both inside the company and with clients.

2 - You’re committed: We believe in nurturing talent from within, so your long-term aspirations are important to us.

3 - You’re professional: You’re committed to excellence and always show up on time and don't make excuses.

If you’re ready to bring your CSR and sales magic to our team and make a difference in the lives of our customers, we’d love to hear from you!

We are looking for a Senior Accountant with strong bookkeeping expertise to join our growing international team.



This role is ideal for someone who not only manages day-to-day bookkeeping but also understands the bigger financial picture — someone who can maintain accurate financial records while supporting financial reporting, forecasting, and business decision-making.



You will play a key role in ensuring financial accuracy, maintaining compliance with Australian accounting standards, and helping leadership understand the financial health of the business.



If you are highly organized, analytical, and experienced in Xero and financial reporting, we want to hear from you.



This position is perfect for a detail-oriented accounting professional who enjoys both operational bookkeeping and higher-level financial analysis.



[What You’ll Do]

Financial Management

- Maintain and manage accurate financial records across all company accounts

- Oversee daily bookkeeping functions and ensure all financial transactions are properly recorded

- Maintain general ledger accuracy and integrity



Account Reconciliation

- Reconcile bank accounts, credit cards, and financial transactions regularly

- Investigate and resolve discrepancies



Financial Reporting

- Prepare and review:

• Monthly financial statements

• Profit & Loss reports

• Balance sheets

• Cash flow reports

- Provide financial insights and recommendations to management



Accounts Payable & Receivable

- Manage incoming and outgoing payments

- Track outstanding invoices

- Maintain positive vendor and client payment relationships



Payroll Support

- Assist with payroll processing

- Ensure accurate employee payments and financial records



Tax & Compliance Support

- Assist with BAS preparation and other tax-related documentation

- Ensure financial records remain compliant with accounting standards



Budgeting & Forecasting

- Assist management with:

• Financial forecasts

• Budget preparation

• Cost analysis



Xero Management

- Maintain and optimize the company’s accounting system in Xero

- Ensure proper account categorization and financial organization



Financial Data Organization

- Maintain well-organized financial documentation for reporting, auditing, and compliance



[What We’re Looking For]

Senior Accounting Experience

- 3+ years experience in accounting or bookkeeping

- Experience managing financial reporting



Xero Expertise

- Strong experience using Xero

- Experience reconciling accounts and preparing reports within Xero



Australian Accounting Knowledge (Highly Preferred)

- Familiarity with:

• BAS

• GST

• Australian financial compliance



Strong Analytical Skills

- Ability to interpret financial data and provide insights



Detail-Oriented

- High accuracy with financial records and reconciliations



Organization & Time Management

- Ability to manage multiple financial tasks and meet deadlines



Communication Skills

- Clear written and verbal English

- Ability to communicate financial information clearly to non-finance tea
mbers



Tech Proficiency

Experience with tools such as:

- Xero

- Google Workspace

- Excel / Google Sheets

- Accounting tools (QuickBooks experience is a plus)



[Bonus Points If You Have]

- Experience working with Australian companies

- Experience supporting growing startups or remote teams

- CPA / Accounting certification

- Experience with financial forecasting and management reporting



[Why Join Our Team]

- Work remotely with an international team

- Opportunity to grow into a Senior Finance Manager role

- Work in a fast-growing company where your input matters

- Long-term role with stability



[How to Apply]

If you believe you're the right person for this role, we want to hear from you.

Please submit:

1. Your CV

2. Portfolio / Sample Work

Create a Google Drive folder containing:

- Resume

- Any relevant financial reports

- Sample reconciliation reports

- Financial dashboards or reports you have prepared

Make sure the folder is shareable to anyone with the link.

3. Short Video Introduction

Record a 1–2 minute video introducing yourself and covering:

- Your accounting experience

- Your experience with Xero

- Your experience working with Australian businesses

- Why you believe you are the right fit for this role



IMPORTANT: Applications that do not include all required items will not be reviewed.



We’re excited to meet someone who is passionate about financial accuracy, business growth, and strong accounting practices.

description:

title: Para-Broker / Mortgage Broking Credit Analyst
description:
Para Broker - Credit Analyst – Australian Mortgage Broking (Medical & Complex Lending Specialist)

Work from Home | Full-Time | 60,000 - 75,000 PHP pm



Are you an EXPERIENCED / SENIOR Para-broker or Credit Analyst ready to level up your career and be part of a thriving, high-performing team? We're an established mortgage brokerage based in Australia, specialising in Finance for Medical professionals — but we handle residential (owner-occupied and investment), commercial, SMSF, complex, and high-net-worth lending.



We're not your average brokerage. Every day is different. Every file presents a new challenge. Our clients are driven, intelligent professionals — and they expect the same from us.



That’s why we’re looking for a **GENUINLY EXPERIENCED** Credit Analyst / Para - Broker — not someone who ONLY submits applications via AOL or plays a broker support/admin role.



What We’re Looking For:



End-to-end experience: From researching borrowing structures, assessing servicing, recommending lenders, and preparing strong applications — through to following deals to settlement.



Confident across multiple loan types: You’ve worked on residential, investment, commercial, SMSF, and trusts, and you're comfortable navigating credit policy across major banks and non-bank lenders.



EXCELLENT English communication skills: You’ll liaise directly with brokers and sometimes clients — explaining your recommendations clearly and concisely.



Problem-solving mindset: You enjoy working through complex deals and helping find smart, viable solutions.



Not a support role: If your background is primarily in administration or document collection/submission only, this role is NOT suitable.



A successful applicant will have experience working with AOL, Mercury & Quickly. If you do not know what these programs are, then you are NOT qualified to enquire for this role. 



Why Join Us?



* Work with a tight-knit team of 3 brokers and 3 support staff who LOVE what they do

* We have a 100% approval track record and highly satisfied clients — your work will directly impact real outcomes

* Above-market salary for the right candidate — we pay well and value skill

* A fun, fast-paced culture — every day is different, and we keep things exciting

* Full-time, permanent, work-from-home role: Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm AEST





How to Apply



Please DO NOT send a CV only.



We want to hear from you.

Send us a short VIDEO INTRODUCTION  (2–4 minutes) where you:



* Walk us through your experience as a Credit Analyst

* Explain the types of loans and clients you’ve worked with

* Tell us how your role differs from broker support or admin staff

* Show us your communication style and English fluency



Upload your video to Google Drive or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link in your application. Failure to do this will result in AUTOMATIC DECLINE of your application, as it will show a lack of attention to detail. ATTENTION TO DETAIL is KEY to this role.  



If you're a true credit analyst who loves problem-solving, has a high attention to detail, excellent English, thrives in a high-achieving team, and wants to work on complex deals that challenge you — this is your next great opportunity.



We look forward to seeing your video!

title: Social Media Content Creation – Artemis II Space Mission
description:
Project Overview

I'm looking for a skilled social media content creator to produce engaging posts across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube, all centered around the Artemis II space mission (launched April 1, 2026).

Deliverables



TikTok & YouTube – Three videos, each shared across both platforms, between 2 minutes 30 seconds and 3 minutes in length (3 videos total, posted on both TikTok and YouTube)

Instagram – Three separate posts, each 90 seconds in length



Assets I Will Provide



3 songs (for use as background/soundtrack)

A selection of photos and video clips



You are also encouraged to source additional high-quality photos online as needed to enhance the content.

Content Theme

All posts should be inspired by and focused on the NASA Artemis II mission — the first crewed lunar flyby in over 50 years. Content should feel compelling, visually dynamic, and suited to each platform's audience and style.

What I'm Looking For



Experience editing short-form and mid-form video content

Strong sense of pacing, music sync, and visual storytelling

Familiarity with TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube formatting

Ability to work with provided assets while supplementing creatively



To Apply

Please share examples of similar video editing or social media content work, ideally in the space, science, or documentary style.



So in total, the freelancer will be creating 6 posts — 3 videos uploaded to both TikTok and YouTube, plus 3 Instagram posts.

title: Real Estate Wholesaling VA – Outreach, CRM & Admin | $6/hr
description:
Real Estate Wholesaling VA – Outreach, CRM & Admin | $6/hr

Full-Time · $6.00/hr USD Remote (Philippines)



About the Role

We are a US- based real estate wholesaling company that buys and sells properties. Whenever we get a new deal under contract, we need to get the word out to our list of buyers as fast as possible, through text and
 blasts. Your job is simple. When we have a deal, you blast it out. When buyers respond with interest, you pass them along to our disposition manager who will close the deal. That's the core of this role. Everything else supports that goal.



What You'll Do Every Day

- Send text blasts to our buyer list using BatchLeads & Smarter Contact

- Pull fresh buyer leads from Investorbase, add them to our main buyer list, & send text blast using Smarter Contact

- Send
 blasts for every new deal we get using Mailchimp

- When buyers respond and show interest, add them in our CRM to pass them to our disposition manager 



Who We're Looking For

- Someone reliable and consistent — this role runs on routine and showing up every day matters

- Comfortable using online tools and platforms (CRM, texting platforms,
)

- Experience with mass texting or
 blasting is a plus

- Can work independently without needing to be micromanaged

- Stable internet connection

- Real estate or wholesaling VA experience is a plus but not required



Schedule

Mon – Fri: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM PST

Sat – Sun: 10:00 AM – 12:30 PM PST



We work 7 days a week because deals don't wait. Weekend hours are lighter but required. If a deal comes in on a Saturday, we need it blasted that day. Please only apply if you can commit to the full schedule.



How to Apply

Send your resume and a short video explaining why you're a great fit for this role to 
 without both a resume and a video will not be considered.

title: Head of Marketplaces (Ecommerce - Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada)
description:
Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



This role is ideal for someone with strong commercial instincts, leadership experience, and hands-on marketplace expertise. You will be responsible for driving revenue growth, managing marketplace operations, and leading strategy across multiple platforms.



Key Responsibilities:



- Defining vision, setting priorities, and driving growth across online marketplaces.

- Own overall marketplace strategy and performance (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, and future platforms)

- Drive sales growth, profitability, and market share.

- Plan and execute campaigns, promotions, and product launches.

- Optimize product listings, pricing, and assortment.

- Analyze sales data, traffic, and conversion metrics to improve performance.

- Manage marketplace operations including inventory coordination, order fulfillment, logistics, returns, and customer service.

- Monitor competitors and marketplace trends.

- Ensure compliance with marketplace policies and standards.

- Collaborate with the Marketing team to optimize demand, funnels, and conversions while scaling livestream, affiliate, and KOL/KOC commerce.

- Oversee forecasting, performance tracking, and executive-level reporting.

- Communication with Key Account Managers.

- Leading PH team, collaborating with other multicultural teams, and managing external partners.



Qualifications:

- 3 - 5 years proven experience in E-commerce Marketplace Management (e.g., Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop) or roles as E-commerce Manager or Marketplace Manager.

- Background in fast-growing or high-volume e-commerce businesses.

- Strong understanding of online sales, promotions, and analytics.

- Knowledge of paid ads within marketplaces (Shopee Ads, Lazada Ads, TikTok Ads).

- Proficient in Google Workspace (especially Google sheets) and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Experience managing multiple SKUs and campaigns.

- Excellent communication and leadership skills.

- Data-driven mindset with strong problem-solving abilities.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.







We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you.

title: Insurance VA
description:
Hourly Rate: Starts at $7/hr

Location: Remote | Schedule: 8 am to 5 pm US timezone



About Us

We are a U.S.-based insurance agency dedicated to simplifying insurance for individuals and businesses. Our team provides support across multiple lines of coverage, including Property & Casualty, Auto, Homeowners, and Business Insurance. We value proactive service, clear communication, and efficient processes to deliver a seamless client experience.



Role Overview

We are seeking a motivated Insurance Virtual Assistant to support our team with administrative and client service tasks. This role is essential in assisting producers and account managers with new business, renewals, and ongoing client servicing. The VA will help ensure smooth workflows by managing documentation, updating client data, coordinating with carriers, and supporting client communications.





Key Responsibilities



Assist with policy renewals by gathering updated client information, requesting quotes, and preparing proposals.

Support new business onboarding by verifying application data, setting up client files, and coordinating with carriers for policy issuance.

Maintain organized and accurate records in our Agency Management System (AMS) and carrier portals.

Generate certificates of insurance, endorsements, and loss run requests.

Monitor renewal timelines and help prevent coverage lapses.

Communicate with clients to collect documentation and respond to basic inquiries.

Prepare insurance summaries, binders, and comparison spreadsheets.

Collaborate with producers and account managers to manage internal workflows and meet deadlines.

Participate in process improvement and automation initiatives.



Qualifications



2+ year of experience in insurance (personal or commercial lines, or administrative insurance support).

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

Excellent written and verbal communication.

Familiarity with AMS platforms (
ntum AMS preferred; experience with Applied Epic, AMS360, Hawksoft, EzLynx, AgencyZoom, or similar systems is a plus), Microsoft Office, and Google Workspace

Ability to multitask and thrive in a fast-paced, team-oriented environment.



To apply: Please submit your application through the link below,

title: Online Science Tutor (Biology/Chemistry/Physics)
description:
A for Effort is a tutoring center located in Jakarta, Indonesia. We offer personalized tutoring sessions specialized in international curriculums. Our goal is to increase students' confidence by simplifying complex concepts and allowing them to truly understand what they are learning. With a focused niche and extensive experience with international students, we provide personalized and tailored tutoring services to meet the needs of each learner.



We are looking for an Online Science Teacher who can teach Biology, Chemistry, or Physics up to an advanced level for Middle and High School students. 



Candidates must have sufficient experience teaching Science in English, as all lessons are conducted in English. Preference for candidates who also have experience teaching Math in addition to Science (Biology, Chemistry, or Physics).



This is a fully remote position, and teachers will conduct lessons online from their own home setup.



Qualifications

Part-time position

Strong knowledge in Biology, Chemistry, or Physics (advanced level preferred)

Experience teaching Science and Math to middle or high school students

Comfortable teaching international students

Must have own reliable internet connection and online teaching setup

Willing to work flexible hours (including evenings or weekends if needed)

Speak fluent English 

Minimum bachelor's degree in a relevant field (Science, Education, etc.)



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



We only consider personalized applications that clearly respond to this job posting. Please include the following information in your message:



- Your teaching experience

- Science topics and grade levels you are comfortable teaching

- Availability for part-time teaching role

- A short introduction about yourself



Please include the word AFETUTOR in the first line of your message so we know you read the full job description.



NOTE

If you are stronger in elementary homeroom subjects (Math, Science, English) or advanced math, please check our Elementary Tutor and Math Tutor positions that are also listed.

title: Senior E-commerce Bookkeeper (Xero · AU Businesses)
description:
NOTE: Applicants who followed instructions will be contacted right away. We are hiring immediately.



Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-time

Working Hours: 8:00am – 4:00pm Philippine Time (Monday–Friday)



About the Role

We’re looking for a Senior E-commerce Bookkeeper with deep, hands-on Xero experience and proven experience supporting Australian e-commerce businesses.



This is not a general bookkeeping role. You will be responsible for accurate e-commerce financials, management reporting, and cashflow forecasting that give clear visibility over performance and cash position in a fast-moving online business.



Key Responsibilities (E-commerce Focused)



1. End-to-end bookkeeping in Xero for an Australian e-commerce business



2. Reconciliation of:

- Bank accounts & credit cards

- Shopify Payments, Stripe, PayPal, Afterpay and similar gateways



3. Accurate handling of:

- Online sales, refunds & chargebacks

- Platform, merchant & transaction fees

- Advertising spend (Meta, Google, TikTok, etc.)



4. Inventory and COGS tracking, including landed costs



5. Preparation of monthly management reporting:

- Profit & Loss

- Balance Sheet

- Cashflow statements



6. Build and maintain rolling cashflow forecasts



7. Assist with Australian BAS & GST reporting in coordination with external accountants



8. Maintain clean financial data across multiple entities and currencies where required



9. Proactively identify reporting issues, discrepancies, or cashflow risks



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)

- Extensive hands-on experience with Xero

- Proven experience working with Australian e-commerce businesses



Strong understanding of:

- Shopify accounting workflows

- Payment gateway reconciliations

- Inventory accounting for e-commerce



Demonstrated experience creating:

- Management P&Ls

- Cashflow forecasts



Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills



Excellent written and spoken English



Nice to Have

- Experience with multi-store or multi-brand e-commerce businesses

- Experience supporting fast-growth online brands

- Comfortable working directly with founders or senior management



Mandatory Application Task (Required to Apply)

To apply for this role, you must complete the Excel task below.

Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Excel Task (30–45 minutes)



Create one Excel file with two tabs:



Tab 1 – E-commerce P&L Layout

Design a monthly Profit & Loss layout suitable for an Australian e-commerce business.

Your layout should clearly show:

Revenue (gross sales)

Cost of Goods Sold (including inventory & landed costs)

Gross Profit

Operating Expenses (advertising, platform fees, freight, overheads)

Net Profit



Tab 2 – Cashflow Forecast Layout

Design a rolling 3-month cashflow forecast layout that includes:

Opening cash balance

Cash inflows from sales

Cash outflows (inventory purchases, ad spend, operating costs, GST)

Closing cash balance per month



Notes:

You do not need to include real numbers

Structure, logic, and clarity matter more than formatting

Include formulas where appropriate



How to Apply



Please submit:

1. Your CV

2. Your Excel file (2 tabs as outlined above)



Applications missing the Excel file will not be considered.

Mandatory Application Task (Required to Apply)

To apply for this role, you must complete the Excel task below.

Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Excel Task (30–45 minutes)



Create one Excel file with two tabs:



Tab 1 – E-commerce P&L Layout

Design a monthly Profit & Loss layout suitable for an Australian e-commerce business.

Your layout should clearly show:

Revenue (gross sales)

Cost of Goods Sold (including inventory & landed costs)

Gross Profit

Operating Expenses (advertising, platform fees, freight, overheads)

Net Profit



Tab 2 – Cashflow Forecast Layout

Design a rolling 3-month cashflow forecast layout that includes:

Opening cash balance

Cash inflows from sales

Cash outflows (inventory purchases, ad spend, operating costs, GST)

Closing cash balance per month



Notes:

You do not need to include real numbers

Structure, logic, and clarity matter more than formatting

Include simple formulas where appropriate



How to Apply



Please submit:

1. Your CV

2. Your Excel file (2 tabs as outlined above)



Applications missing the Excel file will not be considered.



What We Offer: 

- Fully remote role | Stable working hours (8:00am – 4:00pm PH time)

- Long-term opportunity with a growing e-commerce business

- High level of trust, autonomy, and ownership

Work From Home | U.S.-Based Marketing Agency



We are hiring immediately and looking to fill this position within the next few days.



Type of Work: Full Time

Pay: Base + Commission ($1,000 – $1,500+/month potential, higher for top performers)

Hours Per Week: 40



---



Who This Role Is For



This is not a basic VA position.



We are looking for a salesperson who is confident on the phone, understands how to qualify prospects, and knows how to close deals.



If you do not have at least 3 years of sales experience or agency experience, this role is not a fit.



---



Job Overview



We help home improvement businesses (remodeling, flooring, cleaning, roofing, etc.) generate leads using Google Ads.



You will be speaking with warm inbound leads only who schedule an appointment with us. No cold calling.



You will be handling multiple inbound leads and appointments daily — speed and follow-up are critical.



We offer a 30-day free trial for our Google Ads management service. Clients invest in their own ad budget while we manage the campaigns. After the trial, the service continues at $997 per month.



Your job is to call leads during their appointment time, qualify them properly, and close the right them with our free trial services.

You will earn:



* Commission when a client signs up for the 30-day free trial

---

---



We are hire fast, apply today!

title: Senior SEO and Content Execution Lead
description:
FULL-TIME, REMOTE-BASED, WORK FROM HOME



About Privacy Ninja



Privacy Ninja is a Singapore-based data protection and cybersecurity firm focused on making compliance and security practical for everyday businesses.

Through services such as DPO-as-a-Service and vulnerability assessment and penetration testing (VAPT), we help organisations navigate PDPA obligations, strengthen their security posture, and build sustainable compliance practices — without the enterprise-level complexity or cost.



Role Purpose

To own and drive SEO performance, content authority, and execution quality across all Privacy Ninja digital properties. This role is accountable for what ships, where it ships, why it ships, and whether it performs.

This is a judgment-heavy, senior execution role, not a marketing manager or people manager role.



IMPORTANT: At Privacy Ninja, we look for people who embody our Privacy Ninja C.A.R.E. framework – Character, Adaptability, Relational Communication, and Expertise – as these guide how we work and grow together.

This means individuals with strong work ethic, who are approachable, not afraid to admit mistakes, and committed to continuous learning and self-improvement (Character); who are not resistant to adopting new technologies, tools, AI, and automations (Adaptability); capable of clear, empathetic communication with clients and teams (Relational Communication); and who bring deep professional knowledge in the required and relevant skillsets for the role (Expertise). These four pillars define the kind of professionals who thrive in our fast-paced, high-trust environment.



Core Responsibilities

1. SEO Architecture & Authority

-Execute SEO strategy across 10 wordpress websites (6 existing and 4 upcoming)

-Design and maintain topic clusters across all domains, e.g.:

* PDPA compliance by industry (HR, MCST, SaaS)

* VAPT and cybersecurity compliance requirements

-Maintain technical SEO health across all websites:

* Sitemap management

* Schema markup

* On-page optimisation

* Basic site performance hygiene

-Own internal linking strategy, canonical decisions, and content hierarchy

-Identify and resolve keyword cannibalisation and content decay

-D
 when to prune, merge, or refresh content

-Ensure all content meets standards for:

* Technical accuracy

* Readability

* Authority and trust



2. Content Prioritisation & Decision-Making

-Optimise content for:

* Google AI Overviews

* Discovery via AI chat platforms (e.g. ChatGPT, Gemini)

- D
 what content ships, when, and on which domain

- Resolve conflicts caused by timing gaps, PDPC release delays, or competing priorities

- Adjust publishing plans when variance occurs (e.g. missing inputs, new risks)



3. Editorial & Regulatory Judgment

- Final sign-off on:

* Accuracy

* Regulatory tone

* Claim safety

* Publish readiness

- Ensure content meets PDPA, cybersecurity, and reputational standards



4. AI System & Workflow Design

* Design prompt frameworks for SEO, blogs, newsletters, and video scripts

* Select and maintain AI tools used in content production

* Define QA standards to prevent hallucinations and factual errors

* Continuously improve workflows for speed without sacrificing quality



5. Content Optimisation & Performance

- Monitor rankings, indexing, and visibility using SEO tools

- Improve underperforming content

- Optimise content for:

* Google Search

* Google AI Overviews

* AI discovery surfaces (ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.)



6. Risk & Reputation Management

- Identify SEO and content risks across multi-domain strategy

- Protect the company from inaccurate, misleading, or non-compliant content

- Escalate issues that could affect trust or credibility



7. Reporting & Review

- Own bi-weekly reporting to CEO / COO

- Report on:

* SEO performance

* Content effectiveness

* Risks and recommendations

- Use SEMrush or equivalent SEO tools to:

* Track rankings

* Identify gaps

* Improve content performance over time

- Recommend what to continue, revise, or stop



Required Experience

- 5+ years in SEO-driven content roles

- Proven experience owning SEO outcomes (not just writing content)

- Strong understanding of:

* Technical SEO

* Search intent

* Content clustering

* AI-assisted content systems

- Comfortable operating independently with minimal oversight



Soft Skills Required

- Strong time management and self-organisation

- Ability to execute clearly defined tasks at a steady pace

- Comfortable working with structure, templates, and playbooks

- Strong communication skills and ability to work collaboratively with a remote team.

- Willingness to take feedback and iterate quickly

- Attention to detail and a commitment to delivering high-quality work.



Interested candidates, please submit your resume to Nina at 
 look forward to welcoming a new member to our team!



Important Notes for Applicants



This is a full-time remote position. While the role is remote, the successful candidate is expected to work within Privacy Ninja’s standard working hours of 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM (Singapore Time).



Please apply only if you are able to commit to these working hours and the full-time nature of the role.



This position includes a 3-month probationary period.



All applications will go through an initial screening stage before interviews are scheduled. Candidates who are shortlisted for the interview stage are expected to come prepared to discuss their experience, past work, and approach to SEO and content execution.

title: Amazon Operations Manager (FBA / Seller Central)
description:
Amazon Supply Chain & Operations Manager 

Work: Full-time (remote)

Schedule: US EST Hours



We are looking for a highly capable Amazon Supply Chain & Operations Manager to help lead and run our Amazon USA private label business.



This is a hands-on role that combines team oversight and direct execution. It is roughly 50% manager / 50% individual contributor. We need someone who can lead a small team, make sound operational decisions, and also step in directly to solve issues when needed.



This role sits at the center of our operations — from China supplier production, to freight and customs coordination, to 3PL management, to Amazon FBA inventory flow, to Amazon Seller Central account health and operational issue resolution.



This is not a light coordination role. We are looking for someone who understands Amazon operations deeply and can take real ownership.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

>Oversee end-to-end supply chain and operations for our Amazon USA private label business

>Manage inventory flow from suppliers in China to 3PL warehouses in the USA and into Amazon FBA

>Monitor inventory levels and help prevent both stockouts and excess inventory

>Build, manage, and improve monthly and seasonal demand forecasts

>Support purchasing and replenishment decisions based on sales trends, forecasts, and operational constraints

>Step in directly during critical operational periods to help solve logistics issues, customs clearance problems, inbound delays, or other supply chain disruptions

>Manage Amazon Seller Central operational workflows as needed

>Own or help resolve Amazon account health issues, including policy violations, IP complaints, and compliance-related issues

>Coordinate closely with internal teams so inventory planning stays aligned with PPC and business needs

>Monitor product listings, rankings, and competitor activity to help maintain marketplace competitiveness

>Work with suppliers, freight forwarders, and 3PL partners, including issue escalation when needed

>Oversee purchasing activities and help ensure cost-efficiency, strong execution, and on-time delivery

>Manage and mentor a small operations team of 2–3 people

>Help establish clear processes, KPIs, and accountability across the team

>Contribute to process improvement and support other operational or analytical projects as business needs evolve



What We’re Looking For

1. 3+ years of hands-on experience in Amazon operations, supply chain, or logistics within an Amazon environment

2. Strong experience with Amazon FBA, 3PL operations, and international shipping

3. Solid understanding of China-to-USA supply chain flow, including freight forwarding and customs-related coordination

4. Proven experience in forecasting, inventory planning, and demand analysis

5. Hands-on experience using Amazon Seller Central

6. Experience handling Amazon account health, including policy violations, IP complaints, and compliance issues

7. Strong attention to detail, strong judgment, and the ability to solve issues quickly and calmly

8. Highly organized and process-driven

9. Comfortable in a fast-paced, high-responsibility environment

9. Strong English communication skills

10. Strong Google Sheets / Excel skills

11. Comfortable working U.S. East Coast hours



Nice to Have

Experience launching new products on Amazon

Familiarity with tools like Helium 10, SoStocked, or similar forecasting/software tools

Experience managing a small e-commerce or operations team

Familiarity with ClickUp, Asana, or similar project management tools

Mandarin is a plus for supplier communication





What Success Looks Like

Success in this role means keeping operations running smoothly across supply chain and Amazon execution. 

That includes:

> maintaining healthy inventory levels

>reducing stockouts and overstock

>supporting strong FBA inventory performance

>resolving account health and compliance issues quickly improving forecasting accuracy

>helping the team operate with more clarity, accountability, and consistency



(PLEASE TAKE THOUGHTFUL TIME ANSWERING THIS) 

HOW TO APPLY: SEND YOUR UPDATED CV/RESUME WITH THE ANSWER TO THE SCREENING QUESTIONS BELOW:



1) Do you have direct hands-on experience managing Amazon FBA operations in a private label business? Please explain exactly what you personally owned.

2) What type of Amazon business model did you support: private label, wholesale, agency, aggregator, or other?

3) How many SKUs were under your scope, and what types of products were they?

4) Describe your direct role in forecasting, replenishment, and inventory planning.

5) Have you handled China to USA supply chain, 3PL coordination, or FBA inbound issues? Give one example.

6) Have you personally resolved Amazon account health / policy / IP / compliance issues? Give one real example.

7) Tell us about one operational problem you solved that improved execution, reduced stockouts, or prevented costly errors.

8) What exactly did you use Seller Central for in your day-to-day work?

9) Can you work EST hours?

title: Merchandise Planner
description:
Employment Type: Full-time

Start: Immediate

Working Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AEST

Salary: $280 per week





About the Role

We are seeking a commercially driven Merchandise Planner to join our team and play a key role in driving performance across a portfolio of premium global brands.



This role is responsible for managing Open-to-Buy (OTB), forecasting, and inventory strategy across both Wholesale and Direct-to-Consumer (eCommerce) channels. You will ensure the right product is in the right place at the right time, with a strong focus on core product continuity and Never Out of Stock (NOS) execution.



You’ll also work closely with wholesale partners to support growth through data-driven insights, forecasting, and replenishment planning.



Key Responsibilities:



OTB Planning & Forecasting

- Develop and manage OTB across Wholesale and DTC channels

- Build seasonal and in-season forecasts by brand, category, and channel

- Align buy plans with sales targets, stock turn, and margin expectations

- Continuously reforecast based on performance and inventory position



Inventory & Stock Management

- Optimise stock levels across warehouse, ecommerce, and wholesale

- Drive allocation strategies to maximise sell-through and reduce risk

- Identify slow-moving stock and recommend actionable solutions

- Partner with Operations to ensure strong stock flow and availability



Core / NOS Product Management

- Own forecasting and replenishment strategy for core “Never Out of Stock” lines

- Ensure continuity of key styles with minimal stock-outs

- Analyse historical trends and forward demand to guide reorder decisions

- Collaborate with Buying and Supply Chain on repeat orders and timing



Wholesale Partner Management

- Monitor wholesale account performance and identify growth opportunities

- Deliver regular reporting on sales, stock levels, and sell-through

- Manage replenishment programs for core product ranges

- Partner with accounts on forecasting and inventory planning

- Prepare and deliver Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs)



Trade Reporting & Insights

- Deliver weekly trade reports across all brands and channels

- Provide clear, actionable commercial insights

- Identify risks and opportunities early

- Track KPIs including sell-through, stock turn, WOS, and margin



Skills & Experience

- 3–6+ years in Merchandise Planning or Inventory Planning

- Strong experience with OTB, forecasting, and stock planning

- Experience across Wholesale and DTC/eCommerce channels

- Advanced Excel or Google Sheets skills

- Strong analytical mindset with commercial awareness



Key Attributes

- Commercially sharp and outcome-focused

- Data-driven but confident in decision-making

- Strong stakeholder management skills

- Proactive and solutions-oriented

- Thrives in a fast-paced environment



Why Join Us

- Work across a portfolio of premium global brands

- High-impact role with ownership from day one

- Opportunity to shape inventory strategy and commercial performance



To Apply:

- Please share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. What was the approximate monthly or seasonal OTB you managed, and across how many brands/categories?

Include the channels you planned for (Wholesale, DTC, or both)



2. How did you measure forecast accuracy in your role?

What actions did you take when performance was tracking below plan?



3. Provide one example where you directly improved a key KPI (e.g., stock turn, WOS, sell-through, or margin).

Include before vs after results (quantify if possible)



4. Describe how you managed replenishment for core/NOS lines.

How did you determine reorder timing and depth?



5. Advanced Excel / Data Application

Describe a specific Excel/Google Sheets model or tool you built that influenced planning decisions.

What problem did it solve?

title: Direct Response Video Editor
description:
We are Germany’s fastest growing 7-figure DTC health brand looking for a Direct Response Video Editor who can turn raw content into scroll-stopping, high-converting creatives, without being told what to do at every step.



You’ll be working directly with the founder, gaining deep insight into high-converting video scripts and what makes people click, watch, and buy. This is a performance-driven role, we’re not looking for a “video cutter”, but someone who understands direct response marketing psychology and takes full ownership of the creative output.



You’ll receive raw footage from creators and will be responsible for everything: editing, captions, B-roll selection, punchy sound design, overlays, text effects, and pacing. You must know what good B-roll looks like and which clips increase retention, emotional impact, and conversions.



We can deliver raw material for 3-5 creative concepts (á 3-5 hooks each) per week, mostly long-form VSLs. Speed, clarity, and results matter.



Your Responsibilities:

– Turn raw content into performance-optimized ads

– Add captions, hooks, SFX, overlays, emojis 

– Choose B-roll that adds conversion power (no boring stock footage)

– Understands conversion psychology

– Implement best practices from Direct Response Advertising

– Work directly with the founder and learn what truly makes an ad convert

- Continuously improve based on ad performance & feedback



Requirements:

– Proven experience editing Direct Response Ads (Strong Portfolio REQUIRED)

– Full stack AI knowledge (Sora, Kling AI, Nano Banana, Elevenlabs etc.)

– Understanding of performance psychology & funnel structure

– Strong motion graphics skills (After Effects, CapCut, or similar)

– Fast turnaround time

– Fluent in English (even better if German)

– Proactive, independent, hungry to grow



Bonus requirements:

– Experience in health, wellness or DTC products

- Medical knowledge



Ready to apply?

- Send us 2–3 of your best ad edits + your hourly rate

- Optional: Include 1 creative you wish you had edited (with a link)



Note: DON’T apply if you’re looking for a “regular video cutting job”. This is a performance driven role, where you’ll work side-by-side with the founder.

title: Dispatcher
description:
Summary

* Posting Available Equipment - The freight dispatcher will post his truck on the load boards of which he has accounts, he will outline the equipment and time of availability.

* Searching Freight - The freight dispatcher will use the load boards to contact Freight Brokers, Freight Forwarders or Shippers about available loads for your equipment.

* Credit Checks - It is your responsibility to check the credit on the freight broker or shipper prior to accepting the freight. You will do this by using whatever credit service that is available to your carrier such as his factoring company or private credit service.

* Paperwork Transfers - If your carrier has not completed the setup paperwork with the shipper or freight broker already, you will need to fill out the carrier/broker agreement along with any associated payment paperwork and return to the freight broker along with your motor carrier's set up package.

* Insurance Certificates - Contact the carrier’s insurance company and have the freight broker or shipper included as a “Certificate Holder” on the carrier’s insurance policy. All shippers or freight brokers will usually require this to be completed before assigning the load to the carrier.

* Rate Confirmations - Once all the paperwork is transferred to the freight broker or shipper, you will receive a rate confirmation. You will review the details of the rate confirmation for the correct rate and loading orders as agreed, you will then sign and return this to your shipper immediately.

* Driver Dispatch - You will then transfer all information to the carrier for pickups and delivery points and times. I suggest calling the carrier with the load details and also sending a copy of the rate confirmation to his
.

About This Opportunity

I am bulding a peronsal fitness influencer brand building from the ground up, and I am looking for a self-motivated brand builders to join at the very beginning. ??There is no big team, no corporate handbook. There is just a massive opportunity for the right person to come in, be self motivated, and grow something real.?

Two people will be hired for this role. After 2 months, the stronger performer moves into a full-time position with higher pay. The other position ends. This is an opportunity to come in and prove you are the best.



What You Will Be Doing

Content & Editing

Research & Strategy

* Research viral videos in the fitness niche

* Study top performing fitness accounts and identify trends to replicate

* Develop content ideas, angles, and formats that fit the brand

Business & Revenue

 list

* Set up and manage the
 list and send regular
s to subscribers



You Are the Right Person If

* You are self-motivated and do not need to be told what to do every day

* You are obsessed with social media and genuinely understand what makes content go viral

* You take ownership — if something is not working you fix it, if you dont know how you reasearch it and figure it out.

* You are comfortable using AI tools to work faster and smarter

* You are hungry to grow with a brand from the very beginning

* You can handle multiple responsibilities. 

* You see this as more than a job — you see it as a launchpad



Requirements

* Strong video editing skills — CapCut, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut Pro 

* Deep knowledge of TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Pinterest, and Snapchat

* Experience managing or growing social media accounts

* Comfortable with AI tools (ChatGPT, Canva AI, or similar)

* Strong written English for captions, hooks

* Experience with brand outreach, affiliate marketing, or influencer collabs is a strong bonus



What You Get

* Part-time remote work you can do from anywhere

* Direct mentorship and feedback from the brand owner

* After 2 months the top performer gets a full-time role, increased pay, and a share in product revenue

* A real opportunity to grow into a long-term position as the brand scales



How to Apply

If you follow every step work qualifies (Quality) you will be paid $5 to apply to this role.?

Applications without a portfolio or answer to the questions will not be considered.

APPLICATION STEPS
