title: Real Estate Transaction Coordinator / Listing Coordinator (1)
description:
What is it like to work with us? LISTEN TO OUR TEAM! 



We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Real Estate Transaction Coordinator.

This role is for someone who lives in the details, obsesses over contract deadlines, and can manage a complex transaction pipeline without a single ball being dropped. You aren't just "checking boxes"—you proactively identifies gaps in the contract-to-close process, automates repetitive tasks, and ensures our clients and partners experience a seamless, "magic 
nt" closing every single time.



IMPORTANT: Please read the entire job listing carefully. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



ABOUT THE TEAM

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and are dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



Our Core Values:



DELIGHT THE CLIENT: We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.



MASTER YOUR CRAFT: We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.



FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.

We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems and high standards, not just managing tasks for a real estate business.



ABOUT YOU

Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? Do you enjoy turning a ratified purchase contract or listing agreements into a structured project plan with clear deadlines? Are you the type of person who catches a missing signature or a math error on a Closing Disclosure (CD) before anyone else sees it? Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting SOPs, and keeping a team aligned without needing constant supervision? Do you love to communicate quickly and help keep the project on track?

If you are a high-level operator who wants to own the "engine room" of a high-volume real estate team, keep reading.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Transaction & Listing Management

Contract-to-Close Ownership: Manage every aspect of buyer and seller transactions from signed purchase agreement to closing using Skyslope and GoHighLevel.

Offer Packet Coordination: Prepare an offer packet draft with precise signature blocks and routing, and submit to the broker for review. 



Compliance & Auditing: Submit all required documentation to the office broker; ensure 100% file compliance at direction of the responsible broker by monitoring for no missing disclosures.

Closing Logistics: Coordinate with Attorneys, Lenders, Title officers and brokers; collect CD/ALTA statements for broker accuracy review against the commission agreement.



Project & Operations Management

System Building: Spot inefficiencies in the workflow and design/implement improvements or automations to reduce manual effort.



SOP Documentation: Document workflows and create step-by-step guides so the process is repeatable and scalable.

KPI Reporting: Maintain and update the "Deal Tracker" G-Sheet and GHL Opportunity values to ensure leadership has accurate data at all times.



The "Connective Tissue": Act as the bridge between leadership, agents, and clients to ensure no ball is ever dropped.



REQUIREMENTS



Experience & Capability



1. Must have extensive experience in real estate transaction coordination, transaction management, or as a high-level operations associate.

2. Preferred BPO Experience: Previous background in BPO Customer Service is highly preferred.

3. Project Management Experience: Comfortable managing 20+ active files simultaneously with varying deadlines.

4. Automation Mindset: Experience automating workflows (or a deep understanding of how to design them) is highly preferred.

5. Technical Proficiency: Working knowledge of Skyslope and GoHighLevel (GHL) is strongly preferred but not required. Fluent in AI tools (Gemini/Claude/OpenClaw) to improve output speed.



Work Style & Standards

Extremely Detail-Oriented: You find the needle in the haystack every time.

Near-Native English: Exceptional written and spoken communication skills.

Proactive Ownership: You don’t wait to be told something is broken; you anticipate it and fix it before it breaks.

Speed & Urgency: You move with a sense of purpose and meet every deadline, no excuses.



Technical Requirements

A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION is required (at least 150mbps).

Must be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window (standard core hours 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM EST).

Must be flexible to work 2–4 hours on weekends as needed for urgent business requirements



APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS



STEP 1: Application

Please submit your application HERE 

To ensure you have read through the requirements, please write the phrase "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field of the application.



STEP 2: Initial Interview

If your application indicates you might be a great fit, you will be invited to participate in a quick, 10- to 15-minute initial screening interview.



STEP 3: Case Interview

Candidates who pass the initial screening will be invited to a 1-hour case interview. A case interview is an interactive session where we present you with a real-world scenario or business challenge relevant to the role. Rather than just talking about your past experience, this allows us to see your problem-solving process, technical logic, and how you tackle practical situations in real-time.



STEP 4: Reference Check

This is the final step before an official offer is extended. The final candidate(s) must provide one former employer/lead reference and one character reference.



STEP 5: The 90-Day Trial Period

If an offer is made and accepted, your employment will begin with a 90-day PAID trial period. This period is dedicated to ensuring a strong mutual fit—both for the responsibilities of the role and alignment with our core values. 

During these 90 days, we will provide you with all the necessary training, onboarding, and support you need to succeed and thrive on our team. You will be expected to master the Skyslope/GHL workflow, meet all transaction deadlines, and begin documenting/improving our internal systems. A successful trial results in a permanent invitation to the team.



Please submit your application HERE >>

We are looking for an experienced bookkeeper who is not afraid to learn new things daily, for our E-commerce business. This is a high-growth position. You must be a self-starter and love to learn new things!



As a bookkeeper, the ideal candidate is highly driven, enjoys working with numbers, is detail-oriented, and is familiar with Amazon Seller Central and other online marketplaces. This individual will be the primary point of contact for our bookkeeping. The candidate should be experienced and know how to set up QuickBooks. The ideal candidate must have previously successfully delivered P&L reports to the accountant. You may also be required to learn other e-commerce-related skills to fit in with our existing operations. You must be a leader, reliable, communicative, and willing to learn.



If you would like to apply, please answer the questions below and send them to 
 let us know the following answers:



1. How many years of bookkeeping experience do you have?



2. What bookkeeping software do you use, ie. Quickbooks?



NOTE: Failure to follow the exact instructions in your responses will immediately disqualify you. You will NOT be considered if you do not follow the instructions and send back your reply listed herein.



Duties & Responsibilities:

-Reconciliation

-Entering bills

-Paying bills

-Expenses

-Credit card usage

-Bank statements

-Balancing checks

-Amazon reports

-Profit and Loss reports

-Monthly balance sheet

-Making sure all finances are up to date

-Setting up and entering everything into QuickBooks

When applying for the position, please include QuickBooks in the title.



This position is full-time. However, initial training may be part-time only to get new hires up to speed.



Application Instructions (Please Read Carefully)



Please attach your resume in PDF format within your OnlineJobs.ph application.



Use the following file name format:



Resume – [Your Full Name] – [Position Applying For]



Example:

Resume – Juan Dela Cruz – QuickBooks Bookkeeper Virtual Assistant – Amazon Expertise



Applications that do not follow the required file naming format may not be considered. Attention to detail is important for this role, and we review only candidates who carefully follow instructions.



****DO NOT apply if you cannot fulfill the job requirements OR are not detail-oriented ****

title: Tiktok and Youtube Video Editing and Graphics Design VA -- immediate start | Day shift / Night shift
description:
We are a fast-growing E-commerce company based in California, and we are actively looking for an eager and excited graphic/video expert to join our growing e-commerce team! You must have prior graphic design experience and be a self-starter—experience matters. If you don't have any real-world experience, please don't apply. This is a high-growth position.



If you would like to apply, please answer the questions below and send them to 



1. Have you worked with Amazon sellers before? We only want to find experienced graphic designers who have worked with Amazon sellers before.

If your answer is yes, then please send us the Amazon storefront URLs you worked on before, and the listing URL you worked on before



2. Social media posts: Have you worked with social media posts before?

What kind of social media strategies have you worked with in conjunction with graphics and/or videos? If your answer is yes, then please send us the social media pages you worked with and the posts/strategies you worked with in concrete examples.



3. YouTube shorts: Please follow this YouTube link to create a YouTube short video in no more than 15 seconds, follow the SOP described in this YouTube video, and send me 1 example of a YouTube short you will finish.




/watch?v=TBZM7ZQsCQU&t=210s



If none of your answers to the above questions is yes, then we appreciate your application, but at this 
nt, we won't consider candidates without the above experiences.



If you can answer yes to one of the questions above, please let us know.



Please make sure that your reply has the
 title: E-commerce graphic and video VA - Your first name, last name



NOTE: Failure to follow the exact instructions in your responses will immediately disqualify you. You will NOT be considered if you do not follow the instructions herein.



JOB OVERVIEW:

- Amazon EBC

- Photo retouch

- Info-graphics design

- Background removal

- Image editing

- Logo design

- Packaging design

- Video editing (not required but considered a bonus skill)



This will be a part-time position, leading to a full-time position. Remuneration will be project-based.



SKILLS REQUIRED:

- Excellent command of English (written & verbal communication) is a MUST!

- Computer skills are a MUST!

- Typing 60+ WPM

- Well-organized with great time management skills

- Outstanding project management skills

- Graphic design skills & experience

- Experience working with US/UK/Australian companies will be highly considered



Expectations:

- Take directions & able to follow closely; High attention to detail

- Ask questions if you don’t understand directions; communicate if you have new ideas, give suggestions!

- Fast learner who can multitask and has a willingness to work hard

- Requires little supervision

- Have reliable electricity and power (with seldom to no power outages). Punctuality is a must



Application Instructions (Please Read Carefully)



Please attach your resume in PDF format within your OnlineJobs.ph application.

Example:

Applications that do not follow the required file naming format may not be considered. Attention to detail is important for this role, and we review only candidates who carefully follow instructions.

title: Senior Holiday Homes Operations Manager
description:
Please only apply if you are serious and have relevant 5 years + experience. 



We are a fast-growing property management company specialising in long-term rentals and premium holiday homes across Auckland.



We are looking for a highly capable Holiday Homes Operations Manager to take ownership of our short-term rental portfolio and deliver an exceptional guest experience from enquiry through to checkout.



This is not a standard VA role — we are looking for someone experienced, proactive, and confident managing operations at a high level.



The Role



You will be responsible for the day-to-day management of our holiday home portfolio, acting as the central point of coordination between guests and our internal team.



Key responsibilities include:



-Managing all guest communication (pre-booking, during stay, and post-stay)

-Acting as the liaison between guests and our team (property manager, housekeeping, maintenance)

-Managing reservations, booking changes, payments, and add-ons (e.g. cots, extras)

-Preparing and onboarding new properties into our PMS (Guesty)

-Monitoring and maintaining a clear, organised inbox

-Triaging and responding to enquiries, and delegating where appropriate

-Logging and coordinating maintenance jobs

-Processing and tracking invoices and operational admin

-Supporting smooth day-to-day operations across the holiday home portfolio



About You



We are looking for someone who can take ownership and make decisions — not someone who needs constant direction.



You will ideally have:



-Strong experience in short-term rental or property management (Airbnb, Guesty or similar PMS)

-Excellent written communication and customer service skills

-The ability to problem-solve and handle issues independently

-High attention to detail and strong organisational skills

-Confidence managing multiple properties and priorities at once

-Experience coordinating with remote teams (housekeeping, maintenance, etc.)

title: Video Editor/Video Clipper
description:
Full-Time Video Editor / Video Clipper for Music Brand (Long-Term Remote Role)



Work directly with Fedarro

Job Type: Full-Time

Location: Remote

Industry: Music / Content / Education

Pay: Competitive monthly pay in USD

Payment: Weekly via Wise, Payoneer, or Remitly

Hours: Flexible, but deadlines and consistency matter

Growth Path: Long-term role with room for increased responsibility and compensation



About the Role

I’m looking for a high-level Video Editor / Video Clipper who wants a serious long-term opportunity, not just freelance gigs or random one-off projects.



You’ll be helping me turn raw content into powerful short-form and long-form videos that grow my audience, strengthen my brand, promote my offers, and support the bigger mission behind my business.



This is not a role for someone who only knows how to add captions and basic transitions.



I’m looking for someone who understands:



attention and retention

strong hooks

pacing and story flow

social-first editing

repurposing content across platforms

brand consistency

content volume without losing quality

If you are reliable, coachable, fast, organized, and want to grow with one brand over time, this could be a great fit.



About Me

Fedarro is a Grammy-nominated collaborating singer, songwriter, audio engineer, vocal producer, and music entrepreneur who helps music creatives make better music and turn their skills into income.



My content is built around music, creativity, coaching, artist development, mindset, studio sessions, and real-world music business insight. I’ve built multiple six-figure revenue streams in music and created a career outside the traditional industry model.



What You’ll Be Editing

You’ll edit content for:



TikTok

Instagram Reels

YouTube Shorts

YouTube long-form


Courses and programs

Main Responsibilities

Short-Form Content

You’ll turn raw footage into short-form clips such as:



educational talking-head clips

coaching clips

artist development content

studio session 
nts

behind-the-scenes footage

plugin and production breakdowns

product reviews

opinionated or controversial clips with strong hooks

Long-Form Content

You’ll also help edit:



YouTube videos

tutorials

studio breakdowns

course/program content

artist session recaps

equipment and production reviews

Expected Output

This role requires both speed and consistency.



You should be comfortable producing:



10–25 short-form videos per day

1–2 long-form videos per day, depending on footage and complexity

You do not need to overcomplicate edits. But you do need to know how to make content engaging, clean, and effective.



Who I’m Looking For

You are likely a strong fit if you:



have real experience editing TikTok, Reels, and Shorts

understand how to edit for retention, engagement, and replay value

can write or improve hooks, captions, and on-screen text

know how to identify strong 
nts in long footage

can edit fast without constantly sacrificing quality

communicate clearly in English

take feedback well and improve quickly

can stay organized with files, revisions, and delivery

are dependable and don’t disappear

want a stable, long-term remote role

can follow direction while also thinking creatively

are comfortable using CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar tools

can repurpose content across multiple platforms

can schedule posts if needed

This Role Is NOT for You If

Please do not apply if:



you are an agency

you manage a team and won’t be doing the editing yourself

you are looking for side work only

you are applying to hundreds of jobs with copy-paste messages

you need constant chasing to meet deadlines

you are not comfortable with high-volume editing

you are a beginner with no real short-form editing experience

you disappear when feedback gets direct

you want creative freedom but don’t want structure, consistency, or standards

I want someone professional, mature, and serious about doing great work over the long term.



What Matters Most in This Role

I care a lot about:



reliability

speed

communication

consistency

coachability

taste

attention to detail

long-term fit

If you’re amazing but inconsistent, this will not work.



If you’re strong, disciplined, and committed, this can become a major long-term role.



Content Style References

Please review these examples to understand the type of content and editing direction that performs well for my brand:



Instagram / TikTok References



No Longer Registering Songs (Controversy)

You Have to Be Patient Working with Artist

You Have to Be Patient w/ Dope Singers

Coachable Artist Always Win

How I Coached This Artist & Made a Crazy Hook

Your Song Should Be A Conversation

Teaching One Of My Student How to Write a Hook

I Made A Template By Engineering Rlyo

Editing Direction / SOP Playlist



YouTube Playlist Reference

Application Process

I only want applicants who actually read the post and can follow directions.



Step 1: Send an
 to





Step 2: Use this subject line

OLJ Video Editor Application – [Your Name]



Step 3: Include ALL of the following in your

Your full name

Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link

Your portfolio or best 3–5 editing samples

A short note explaining:

how long you’ve been editing

what content niches you’ve worked in

what editing software you use

Your weekly availability

Your internet speed

Your computer specs

Your expected monthly salary in USD

A short answer to this question:

Why do you think you’re a good fit for this role?

Step 4: Add this line at the top of your

“Long-term, reliable, and ready to grow.”



If that line is missing, I will assume you did not read the post carefully.



Test Task

Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a test edit based on my content style.



I prefer to review your portfolio and application quality first before moving forward, so only serious candidates will receive the next step.



This helps save time for both sides and keeps the process focused on people who are genuinely a fit.



What You Can Expect If Hired

If you’re the right fit, this can become a long-term role with:



steady work

clear direction

room to improve your skillset

increasing trust and responsibility

long-term growth with one brand instead of constantly chasing new clients

I value loyalty, consistency, and people who take pride in doing strong work.



If that sounds like you, apply.



Optional stronger version for even better filtering

If you want, you can add this line near the top of the job post:



Preference will be given to applicants who have experience editing for coaches, personal brands, educators, music creators, or social-first content brands.



That will reduce generic applicants even more.



My honest recommendation

For higher-quality filtering, this version is better than asking everyone to do the test immediately.



Why:



serious applicants will complete the detailed application properly

low-quality applicants usually skip instructions

you won’t get buried under random test submissions from people who aren’t a fit

you can shortlist only the best candidates for the edit test

title: Amazon Wholesale VA
description:
We are looking to hire an experienced Amazon Wholesale Virtual Assistant whose main strength is product sourcing and advanced Keepa analysis. 

Please apply only if you have at least 2+ years of Amazon wholesale experience and have worked with accounts doing $30K+ in monthly sales. Your role will be to source profitable products for Amazon FBA, analyze listings using Keepa, and identify opportunities with stable Buy Box, consistent sales rank, and healthy seller rotation. Experience using tools like SellerAmp SAS and Google Sheets is a plus. 



Compensation will be based on experience and will include an hourly rate plus a performance-based business percentage bonus. If you meet these requirements, please send an
 to 
 including proof you have worked with an Amazon account doing $30K+ in monthly sales, your years of experience, and the tools you use for sourcing. Use the subject line “Amazon Wholesale VA – 30K Experience.”

title: Salesperson
description: This is a sales job that involves cold calling leads. You will be a cold caller for a web design agency. Leads will be provided! We are looking for someone with exceptional English. Support and a sales script will be provided for you! Sales or cold calling experience is preferred.

title: Cold Caller, B2B, Architects and Design Firms,
description:
**About Us**

We are a U.S.-based engineering firm working with architects, builders, and developers and General Contractors. We are growing and looking for a reliable caller to help us build new relationships.



**Job Overview**

We are hiring a full-time cold caller to contact architecture firms and introduce our company.



Your role is NOT to sell or close deals.



Your job is to:



* Start conversations

* Identify the right contact

* Create interest

* Pass warm leads to our Business Development Manager



**Daily Responsibilities**



1. Make 100 plus outbound calls per day

2. Speak with architects (or other specified prospect) and office staff

3. Deliver a short introduction script

4. Identify decision makers

5. Collect name,
, and notes

6. Log all activity in our CRM Apptivo

7. Pass interested leads to our BDM (Business Development Manager)



**What Success Looks Like**



* You consistently generate interested contacts

* You collect accurate information

* You stay organized and reliable

* You communicate clearly and professionally



**Requirements**



1. Strong spoken English

2. Confident and friendly on the phone

3. Comfortable with high call volume

4. Reliable internet and quiet workspace

5. Experience in cold calling, appointment setting, or lead generation preferred



**Work Schedule**

U.S. business hours, Central Time preferred



**Pay**

$5 to $8 per hour depending on experience

Plus bonus for qualified leads passed to our team

$5 per qualified lead





**How to Apply**

Please include:



1. A short voice recording introducing yourself

2. Your experience with cold calling or outbound sales

3. Your internet speed and headset setup



**IMPORTANT**

To be considered, start your application with the word: **ENGINEERING**
